sections.paragraph:
περίπικρος, ον (Philod., Ira [=Περὶ ὀργῆ PHercul. 182] p. 6 Wilke; Vi. Aesopi I G 38 P. and other later wr.) very bitter fig., of a glance βλέμμα π. a very bitter look Hs 6, 2, 5.—DELG s.v. πικρός.

Philod Philod , I b.c.—List 5

Vi. Aesopi Vi. Aesopi , = Vitae Aesopi, I a.d.—List 5

  1. wr. = writers, writings

Hs Hs = Similitudes

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 804
